reviews.comment:
Mala atención del personal, desinterés en dar un servicio mínimo a los clientes. Ni siquiera me ofrecieron limpiar los parabrisas... Lo tuve q terminar haciendo yo...

(Translated by Google)
Poor customer service, no interest in providing even minimal customer service. They didn't even offer to clean my windshield... I had to do it myself.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXd3JLN0N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención ,poca concurrencia las instalaciones están lindas la ubicación me parece que están mal ya que para un solo sentido y en una rotonda  es difícil el acceso

(Translated by Google)
Good service, not crowded, the facilities are nice, but the location seems bad to me since it's a one-way street at a roundabout, making access difficult.
